title: Duck Totem
description: Makes the Totem A Rubber DUCK🦆
body: ![DUCK TOTEM!!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1df9482f9039abd6a53a99e8ab42476f9de0ad4e.png) This Resource pack changes the Totem of undying to a Rubber duck... bcz ## preview ![quak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40dc935c0705e3e69cc0c9819886ee5995c7d1a0.png) This is the texture of the duck . # **APRIL FOOLS VERSIONS** I will make a version for april fools snapshot after 20w14potato with a twist, the april fools version has a custom texture in the theme of the update. ---
